channel.title: Video-Processing on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Video-Processing on Arrans github.io

item.title: roboflow/supervision
item.description: We write your reusable computer vision tools. 💜

item.title: IliasHad/edit-mind
item.description: Local-first AI video intelligence platform. Index your video library with multi-modal analysis (YOLO, DeepFace, Whisper), search semantically via natural language, Docker-ready.

item.title: TheNickOfTime/handbrake-web
item.description: A self-hosted platform to use HandBrake on your headless devices via a bespoke web interface. Harness the processing power of multiple devices to work on a single queue.
